name: Tblisi Beef & Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: Beef steak, 2.5 pounds, cut into 3/4-inch chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the spices in a bowl and set aside.
2. Place the meat on a cutting board and cut into 3/4-inch chunks. Lay these chunks flat and sprinkle with the spice mixture.
3. Cook the noodles according to package instructions until al dente. Drain and set aside.
4. Heat a large, heavy pot over high heat for 3-4 minutes.
5. Add vegetable oil and onions. Sauté until onions are translucent.
6. Add meat and remaining spice mixture. Stir and cook for approximately 4-6 minutes.
7. Add beef stock. Scrape the pot bottom to remove crusts and mix into the meat.
8. Reduce heat to medium-high and stir in sifted flour. Cook for 3 minutes.
9. Add mushrooms and cook for another 3 minutes.
10. Whisk in sour cream and yogurt, then cook for 2-3 minutes.
11. Drain noodles and serve a portion of noodles on each plate with the meat mixture over the top.
